expectations.text: Agent infers or asks which project should actually be active (does not just accept the wrong one)
expectations.evidence: Decision Point section states: 'Approach: 1. First attempt: Infer from context. ... 2. If context unclear: Ask the user "Which project should be active instead?"' — the agent explicitly reasons about whether to ask or infer rather than silently accepting P0054.

expectations.text: Agent calls load_project on the correct project (P0048 in this scenario)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows: '[SIMULATED CALL] load_project(id: "P0048")' with confirmation 'Active project now: P0048 hmem'

expectations.text: Agent checks the wrongly-activated project's O-entry (O0054) for misrouted exchanges from the current session
expectations.evidence: Step 3 states: '[SIMULATED CALL] read_memory(id: "O0054")' and proceeds to analyze each exchange (O0054.1, O0054.2, O0054.3) for misrouting.

expectations.text: Agent describes using move_nodes to move misrouted exchanges from wrong O-entry to correct one
expectations.evidence: Step 3 shows: '[SIMULATED CALL] move_nodes(node_ids: ["O0054.2", "O0054.3"], target_o_id: "O0048")' with full result description.

claims.claim: The agent correctly identifies O0054.2 and O0054.3 as misrouted based on content analysis
claims.evidence: Step 3 analysis: 'O0054.2: "User switched context to hmem", "P0048 questions", "hmem system" → Belongs to P0048 (Misrouted)' and 'O0054.3: "project activation flow", "P0048 context", "move_nodes" → Belongs to P0048 (Misrouted)'

claims.claim: The agent keeps O0054.1 (MAIMO combat mechanics) in place as legitimately belonging to P0054
claims.evidence: 'O0054.1: "MAIMO combat mechanics" → Belongs to P0054 ✓ (Correct routing, keep in place)'

suggestions.assertion: Agent infers or asks which project should actually be active (does not just accept the wrong one)
suggestions.reason: This assertion passes even when the agent simply reads the project ID from scenario context metadata. A stronger version would verify the agent handles the ambiguous case where context does not already state which project should be active.

eval_feedback.overall: All four critical behaviors for the wrong-project scenario are covered. The with_skill response demonstrates thorough content-based misrouting detection which goes beyond what the assertions strictly require.
